## Validation Checklist

- [ ] `catalog.yaml` updated (if needed)
- [ ] `pack.yaml` required fields present
- [ ] `SKILL.md` exists
- [ ] `examples/smoke.md` exists
- [ ] `README.md` exists
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_catalog.py catalog.yaml` passes
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_treasures.py catalog.yaml` passes
